title: Set current year with specific date

posts.author: Lenzie (Lenzie Lin)
posts.cookedHtml:
How can I set current year with specific date of past years in column? Or are there formulas to match this?
I tried to customize and choose “Show Current Year” but it works for current date only.
For example: I would like to let 01/03/2019 in DOB column show 01/03/2023 in Birthday notification column.

It would be much appreciated if you could help me.

Thank you so much

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Lenzie!

Would you following automations better assist you in managing birthday’s each year?

birthday auto1288×416 36.4 KB

This way each yer the date will be pushed to the following year!

Let me know what you think

posts.author: Lenzie (Lenzie Lin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi BiancaT,

Thank you for your quick reply.
I’ll try it.

posts.author: lsechrest (Linda Sechrest)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I’m pretty new to Monday.com but I have the same issue with Birthday and Anniversary notifications. My question is about the first automation listed. Is Next Year a completely different board or group that the birth date is moved to?

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @lsechrest ,

Welcome to the monday community!

Next Year is most likely a group here.

Best,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Linda!

Next Year is a group in this scenario (especially if you’d like to centralise everything in on place)

posts.author: Renae-JTsCloud (Renae-upstream)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Lenzie just jumping here on this- if you write the automation this way, you will run into some trouble next year with the leap year and everything.

Instead of doing 365 days- do 12 months! That will stop leap years from having an impact.

posts.author: Lenzie (Lenzie Lin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Here is update formula:
DATE(YEAR(TODAY()),MONTH({DOB}),DAY({DOB}))

I use above formula to update the clients’ birthday into current year and it works!
However I still cannot set automations from formula column for reminding. Hope it will be available soon.

posts.author: Lenzie (Lenzie Lin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Thank you for your suggestion
